name: 发展经济学
subject: economics
domain_name: 全球经济 / Global Economy / Global Economy
curriculum_points: Students will be able to compare and contrast alternative measures of economic development, including the Human Development Index (HDI) and the Multidimensional Poverty Index (MPI).
Students will be able to evaluate the role of domestic factors (e.g., education, institutional quality) and international factors (e.g., debt, aid, trade) in economic development.
